The Omega self is an aspirational self which exists beyond the current self. People seek to become the Omega Self. <ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 49 0:50:19</ref>

== See Also ==

* Corbin and Angels<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JQsL-yOvB38&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=56&pp=sAQB</ref>

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Omega Self]][[Category:Omega]]
[[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Omega Self]]
[[Category:Pages]]
